_comment: Per-project ComfyUI start policy for ComfyUI-Agent-Kit. Copy to '.comfyui-agent.json' at your project root and commit it. The agent reads it so a pipeline never blocks on a question. Env vars (COMFY_HOST / COMFYUI_START_POLICY / COMFYUI_LAUNCH_CMD) override this file.
_startPolicy_options: connect = use a running server, fail clearly if down | autostart = start the headless server if down | ask = prompt the owner (interactive only)
_launchCmd_note: Used only when startPolicy=autostart and the server is down. Run in the background. On Windows set PYTHONUTF8=1 or the server can crash on emoji log output under a non-UTF-8 codepage. For a source install this is just 'python main.py' in the ComfyUI dir.
_workflowsDir_note: Where built/run workflows are saved (the bridge) so they persist and the owner can open them later from the Workflows sidebar.
